def negative_hardcoded_api_key_in_source():
    rule_id = "hardcoded_api_key_in_source"
    family = "mlops"
    severity = "warning"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Hardcoded model-provider API keys or secret-like tokens appear in source."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
